Class AbstractProofControl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.control.AbstractProofControl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProofControl
Direct Known Subclasses:
DefaultProofControl, MediatorProofControl
public abstract class AbstractProofControl extends Object implements ProofControl
Provides a basic implementation of ProofControl.

    getAppsForName(Goal goal, String name, PosInOccurrence pos, TacletFilter filter)
    collects all taclet applications for the given position and taclet (identified by its name) matching the filter condition

    collects all built-in rules that are applicable at the given sequent position 'pos'.

    collects all built-in rule applications for the given rule that are applicable at position 'pos' and the current user constraint

    collects all applications of a rule given by its name at a give position in the sequent

    • getAppsForName

      protected ImmutableSet<TacletApp> getAppsForName(Goal goal, String name, PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all Taclet applications at the given position of the specified taclet
      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal for which the applications should be returned
      name - the String with the taclet names whose applications are looked for
      pos - the PosInOccurrence describing the position
      Returns:
      a list of all found rule applications of the given rule at position pos

    • getAppsForName

      protected ImmutableSet<TacletApp> getAppsForName(Goal goal, String name, PosInOccurrence pos, TacletFilter filter)
      collects all taclet applications for the given position and taclet (identified by its name) matching the filter condition
      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal for which the applications should be returned
      name - the String with the taclet names whose applications are looked for
      pos - the PosInOccurrence describing the position
      filter - the TacletFilter expressing restrictions
      Returns:
      a list of all found rule applications of the given rule at position pos passing the filter

    • completeAndApplyApp

      public TacletInstantiationModel[] completeAndApplyApp(List<TacletApp> apps, Goal goal)

    • createModel

      public TacletInstantiationModel createModel(TacletApp app, Goal goal)

    • selectedBuiltInRule

      public void selectedBuiltInRule(Goal goal, BuiltInRule rule, PosInOccurrence pos, boolean forced, boolean interactive)
      Description copied from interface: ProofControl
      selected rule to apply
      Specified by:
      selectedBuiltInRule in interface ProofControl
      Parameters:
      rule - the selected built-in rule
      pos - the PosInSequent describes the position where to apply the rule
      forced - a boolean indicating that if the rule is complete or can be made complete automatically then the rule should be applied automatically without asking the user at all (e.g. if a loop invariant is available do not ask the user to provide one)
      interactive - whether the rule was applied by the user

    • getBuiltInRuleApp

      public ImmutableSet<IBuiltInRuleApp> getBuiltInRuleApp(Goal focusedGoal, BuiltInRule rule, PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all built-in rule applications for the given rule that are applicable at position 'pos' and the current user constraint
      Parameters:
      rule - the BuiltInRule for which the applications are collected
      pos - the PosInSequent the position information
      Returns:
      a SetOf with all possible rule applications

    • getBuiltInRuleAppsForName

      protected ImmutableSet<IBuiltInRuleApp> getBuiltInRuleAppsForName(Goal focusedGoal, String name, PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all applications of a rule given by its name at a give position in the sequent
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the BuiltInRule for which applications are collected.
      pos - the position in the sequent where the BuiltInRule should be applied
      Returns:
      a SetOf with all possible applications of the rule

    • completeBuiltInRuleAppByDefault

      public static IBuiltInRuleApp completeBuiltInRuleAppByDefault(IBuiltInRuleApp app, Goal goal, boolean forced)
      Default implementation of RuleCompletionHandler.completeBuiltInRuleApp(IBuiltInRuleApp, Goal, boolean).

    • isAutoModeSupported

      public boolean isAutoModeSupported(Proof proof)
      Checks if the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl supports the given Proof.
      Specified by:
      isAutoModeSupported in interface ProofControl
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to check.
      Returns:
      true auto mode support proofs, false auto mode don't support proof.

      public void startAutoMode(Proof proof)
      Starts the auto mode for the given Proof.
      Specified by:
      startAutoMode in interface ProofControl
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to start auto mode of.

    • startAndWaitForAutoMode

      public void startAndWaitForAutoMode(Proof proof)
      Starts the auto mode for the given proof which must be contained in this user interface and blocks the current thread until it has finished.
      Specified by:
      startAndWaitForAutoMode in interface ProofControl
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to start auto mode and to wait for.

    • startAndWaitForAutoMode

      public void startAndWaitForAutoMode(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
      Starts the auto mode for the given proof which must be contained in this user interface and blocks the current thread until it has finished.
      Specified by:
      startAndWaitForAutoMode in interface ProofControl
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to start auto mode and to wait for.
      goals - The Goals to close.

    • stopAndWaitAutoMode

      public void stopAndWaitAutoMode()
      Stops the currently running auto mode and blocks the current Thread until auto mode has stopped.
      Specified by:
      stopAndWaitAutoMode in interface ProofControl

    • startAutoMode

      public void startAutoMode(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
      Starts the auto mode for the given Proof and the given Goals.
      Specified by:
      startAutoMode in interface ProofControl
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to start auto mode of.
      goals - The Goals to close.

    • startAutoMode

      protected abstract void startAutoMode(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals, ProverTaskListener ptl)

    • startFocussedAutoMode

      public void startFocussedAutoMode(PosInOccurrence focus, Goal goal)
      starts the execution of rules with active strategy. Restrict the application of rules to a particular goal and (for focus!=null) to a particular subterm or subformula of that goal
      Specified by:
      startFocussedAutoMode in interface ProofControl

      public void addInteractionListener(InteractionListener listener)
